17. Upload a-file
Uploads a file to ThreatQ.
Base Command
threatq-upload-file
Input
Argument Name
name: threatq-upload-file

outputs.description: Date Date of the file upload. ThreatQ.File.Size
outputs.name: ThreatQ.File.CreatedAt

outputs.description: Size (in bytes) of the file. ThreatQ.File.MD5 The MD5 of the file.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The File ID in ThreatQ. ThreatQ.File.Name The name of the File.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.File.ID

outputs.description: The title of the file. ThreatQ.File.UpdatedAt Date
outputs.name: ThreatQ.File.Title

outputs.description: ThreatQ.File.MalwareLocked Whether malware files are zipped. ThreatQ.File.ContentType
outputs.name: The last update of the file.

outputs.description: The content type of the file. ThreatQ.File.Category The type of the file.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The source of the file. ThreatQ.File.Source.Name The source name of the file.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.File.Source.ID

outputs.description: The attribute ID of the file. ThreatQ.File.Attribute.Name The attribute name of the file.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.File.Attribute.ID
